message.content:
@startuml
' Define custom styles to match the original diagram's appearance
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  BorderThickness 1
}

skinparam enumBackgroundColor #FFCCCC
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor LightGreen
skinparam attributeIconSize 0

class Team <<Class>> {
    name: string
    description: string
    ownerId: User
    participants: Participant[]
    topics: Topic[]
}

class ChallengeReport <<Class>> {
    userId: User
    challengeId: Challenge
    answer: string[]
    answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

class Participant <<Class>> {
    userId: User
    points: number
    status: ParticipantStatus
}

enum ParticipantStatus <<EnumerationType>> {
    PENDING
    ACCEPTED
    DISABLED
}

class Subtopic <<Class>> {
    name: string
    description: string
    challenges: Challenge[]
}

class EducationalBackground <<EnumerationType>> {
    MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
    MIDDLE_ONGOING
    MIDDLE_COMPLETE
    HIGH_INCOMPLETE
    HIGH_ONGOING
    HIGH_COMPLETE
    GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
    GRADUATION_ONGOING
    GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

class User <<Class>> {
    name: string
    email: string
    educationalInstitution: string
    educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
    birthDate: Date
    points: number
}

class Challenge <<Class>> {
    name: string
    body: string
    type: ChallengeType
    selection: string[]
    correct: string[]
    points: number
    feedback: string
}

enum ChallengeType <<EnumerationType>> {
    INPUT
    RADIO
    CHECKBOX
}

class Topic <<Class>> {
    name: string
    icon: string
    isSequential: boolean
    subtopics: Subtopic[]
}


Team "1" *-- "0..n" Topic : 
ChallengeReport "1" --* "1" User : 
Participant "1" o--> "status" ParticipantStatus : 
Subtopic "1" --> "challenges" Challenge : 
User "1" -> "educationalBackground" EducationalBackground : 
Topic "1" diamond-up "subtopics" Subtopic : 

@enduml
